iron_vow.effect: Power counts one band higher on break-tagged skills; Composure counts one band lower.
iron_vow.summary: Power counts one band higher on break-tagged skills; Composure counts one band lower.

glass_lens.effect: Precision gains extra weakness damage, but Guard starts lower.
glass_lens.summary: Precision gains extra weakness damage, but Guard starts lower.

witness_thread.effect: Entering Flow grants +1 Spotlight once per battle.
witness_thread.summary: Entering Flow grants +1 Spotlight once per battle.

black_salt_charm.effect: Parry counters also apply the wielder's affinity status.
black_salt_charm.summary: Parry counters also apply the wielder's affinity status.

flood_seal.effect: First Tide or Halo skill each battle cleanses one debuff from the user.
flood_seal.summary: First Tide or Halo skill each battle cleanses one debuff from the user.

red_wire_crown.effect: Crit chance rises while below 50% HP, but incoming crit damage also rises.
red_wire_crown.summary: Crit chance rises while below 50% HP, but incoming crit damage also rises.

toll_ledger.effect: Deal extra Break damage to bosses above 50% HP.
toll_ledger.summary: Deal extra Break damage to bosses above 50% HP.

hollow_badge.effect: Entering Bastion restores extra Guard and slightly widens the next parry window.
hollow_badge.summary: Entering Bastion restores extra Guard and slightly widens the next parry window.

green_fuse.effect: Triggering a status combo grants 1 Spotlight. Once per round.
green_fuse.summary: Triggering a status combo grants 1 Spotlight. Once per round.

penitent_nail.effect: Finishers deal extra damage below 50% HP but cost 5% current HP.
penitent_nail.summary: Finishers deal extra damage below 50% HP but cost 5% current HP.

bellglass_notch.effect: First successful parry each battle against heavy/channel pressure reveals the attacker and grants Spotlight.
bellglass_notch.summary: First successful parry vs heavy/channel reveals the attacker and grants +1 Spotlight.

floodgate_loop.effect: Successful dodges against burst-start or heavy pressure soak the attacker and rinse one minor debuff.
floodgate_loop.summary: Dodge vs burst-start/heavy applies Soak to the attacker and cleanses one minor debuff.

maintenance_harness.effect: Successful guard restores guard and grants barrier. Bastion posture strengthens both.
maintenance_harness.summary: On successful guard: restore guard and gain barrier, stronger in Bastion.

slip_ledger.effect: Successful dodge grants Spotlight and softens the next offensive self-risk, stronger in Flow.
slip_ledger.summary: On successful dodge: gain Spotlight and reduce self-risk on the next offensive action.

choir_hook.effect: Successful parry reveals the attacker and drives extra break pressure. Focus posture sharpens the break hit.
choir_hook.summary: On successful parry: reveal attacker and add break pressure, stronger in Focus.

applause_knot.effect: Successful parry stores a charge. The next offensive action consumes it for bonus damage and break.
applause_knot.summary: Parry stores a charge that is consumed by the next offensive action for bonus damage and break.

kings_wager.effect: The wearer takes double incoming damage. Every 5 executions by the wearer fully heal the living party.
kings_wager.summary: Double incoming damage; every 5 wearer executions fully heal the living party.

black_vial_cord.effect: Potion use grants Black Vial stacks. The next successful attack consumes them for bonus damage and status pressure.
black_vial_cord.summary: Potion use builds Black Vial stacks; the next successful attack consumes them for damage and status power.

anklet_bell_in_rain.effect: Backflip and Backstep Slash prime an AP refund. The next successful attack refunds 1 AP, and crits carry Precision forward.
anklet_bell_in_rain.summary: Evasive actions prime an AP refund; the next successful attack refunds 1 AP and crits carry Precision forward.
